sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Anonymus Londnensis</hi> [Anon.Lond.] <date TEIform="date">i A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Anonymi Londinensis ex Aristotelis Iatricis Menoniis et aliis medicis eclogae,</title_> ed. H. Diels (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> iii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1893.</item>
